mxCell.value: 🏭 HBQ PCIe Base Card V2.0 · FPGA+MCU Motion Control & DAQ Card · Rev 2.0 · 01/2026
🔵 FPGA — Xilinx Artix-7 XC7A35T (AC7A035 module · 33K LC · 50 DSP · 4 GTP · XADC)
PCIe Endpoint IP Core (Gen2 x4) GTP MGT ×4 lanes
USB FIFO Interface FT601Q 32-bit bus DATA[31:0] · BE[3:0]
Encoder Counter ×6 A/B/Z Quadrature HW up to 10 MHz
ADC SPI Master AD7606C 8ch 16-bit Serial: DOUTA/B/C/D
GTP Transceiver PCIe Gen2 x4 6.6 Gbps/lane
ISO DI Logic ×8 ISO7740 Input Side FPGA_ISO_IN[1..8]
ISO DO Logic ×8 ISO7740 Output Side FPGA_ISO_OUT[1..8]
FMC Bus Bridge → MCU 16-bit parallel data DA[0..15] Addr A[16..23] · NOE/NWE/NE1
PCIe Reset Logic PCIE_PERST# → FPGA_RST FPGA_BUTTON input
QSPI Flash (on module) 16MB NOR Flash Bitstream + user data
TL082 Op-Amp Buffer 2× U16, U18 OPA_DAC_OUT1–4
AM26LV32E ×6 Encoder RS-422 RX + SN74LVC14A Schmitt
AM26LV31E ×3 Motor RS-422 TX PWM+DIR differential
ESD Protection NUP2105 TVS ×N BAS40-04 JTAG
FMC Slave 16-bit parallel bus ← FPGA Bridge
APS6404L-3SQR-SN QSPI PSRAM · 64Mbit MCU direct access
J11 IMU Sensor Port 30-pin RSM-115-02 SPI2/SPI3/I2C4
Encoder Input ×6 RS-422 diff A/B/Z ENC_1–6 ±
Motor PWM+DIR ×6 RS-422 diff output MDR_PWM1–6 · DIR1–6 ±
Analog Input ×8 (AI_IN1–8 ±) 16-bit diff · AD7606C · ±5V/±10V 200kSPS simultaneous · AGND isolated
Analog Output ×4 (OPA_DAC_OUT1–4) 16-bit buffered · DAC81404 + TL082 Voltage output
Isolated DI ×8 (ISO_IN1–8) ISO7740 · 2500 VRMS IN_ISOV+ (pin33) / IN_ISOGND (pin34)
Isolated DO ×8 (ISO_OUT1–8) ISO7740 · 2500 VRMS OUT_ISOV+ (pin35) / OUT_ISOGND (pin36)
GND (pin 41/42/52/92) 12V optional pin51 DNP IN/OUT_ISOV+ user supply

Pin 1–4: RS-485 | Pin 5–15: Motor ch1,3 | Pin 16–31: Encoder | Pin 32–42: ISO+Power Pin 43–50: ADC ch5–8 | Pin 54–57: CAN | Pin 58–65: Motor ch2,4 | Pin 66–79: Encoder Pin 80–87: ISO DI/DO | Pin 88–91: DAC | Pin 92: GND | Pin 93–100: ADC ch1–4
PCIe J1 — Host Slot 12V + 3.3V PRSNT# + SMBUS
Fuse F2 (2A) + D13 diode OvCurrent protect
⚡ POWER SUPPLY ARCHITECTURE — 12V Input → On-board SMPS
3.3V consumers: Logic · CAN · USB · ISO · JTAG · MCU · RS-485
1.8V consumers: FPGA I/O Banks (B13/B14/B15/B16 VCCO=3.3V via buffer)
1.5V consumers: HyperRAM VCC · TXB0108 level-shifter VCCA

Power-UP sequence: VCCINT(1.0V) → VCCBRAM(1.0V) → VCCAUX(1.8V) → VMGTAVCC(1.0V) → VMGTAVTT(1.2V) → VCCO(3.3V) All sequences managed automatically by on-module (AC7A035) power management ICs — user supplies 5V only.
